reforms.description: The Government has revised arrangements to encourage energy efficiency in the industrial sector, requiring the Industrial Development Authority to consider energy efficiency before granting aid to new industries. The IDA offers generous investment incentives, including grants for equipment and factories, aimed at fostering industrial growth and technological advancement in Ireland.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The reforms aim to enhance industrial growth and technological advancement, which are expected to raise productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The IDA's investment incentives are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent a significant overhaul of the IDA's approach to industrial support, focusing on energy efficiency and investment incentives.
reforms.source_quote: The incentives, which cover taxation, export subsidies, employment grants as well as initial grants to cover the purchase of equipment and factories, are among the most generous of their kind in the OECD area.

reforms.description: The Industrial Development Authority's industrial promotion programme aims to create 15,000 new jobs annually from 1978 to 1982, with a focus on domestic sources.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme is designed to stimulate job creation, which supports economic growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been officially announced but is not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, the job creation programme is a narrower initiative within the broader reforms of the IDA.
reforms.source_quote: The Industrial Development Authority has published details of their industrial promotion programme in coming years in IDA Industrial Plan 1978-1982.

reforms.description: The IDA provides special grant incentives for small firms, first-time entrepreneurs, and industrial training programs, as well as for research and development related to industrial products and processes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These incentives are aimed at fostering innovation and development within small firms, which can enhance overall economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The IDA's grant incentives are currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The provision of grant incentives is a significant but narrower reform aimed at supporting small businesses and R&D.
reforms.source_quote: Special grant incentives exist for small firms, for first time entrepreneurs, for industrial training programmes and towards the cost of research and development concerned with industrial products and processes.
